title: Add Internet Standard (Google) Keybaord Shortcuts
excerpt:
Implement keyboard shortcuts for navigating items in boards that are standard in other applications like Google Docs and Gmail. 
Shortcuts like 
j/k for down/up 
c for create new item 
/ for search

posts.author: lioncladowls (Collin Oswald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Implement keyboard shortcuts for navigating items in boards that are standard in other applications like Google Docs and Gmail.

Shortcuts like
j/k for down/up
c for create new item
/ for search
